name: PM Kanya Shiksha Protsahan Yojana
benefits: One-time grant of ₹3,000 for girls continuing education after class 8
description: A scholarship scheme encouraging girl children from economically weaker sections to continue their schooling beyond the elementary level.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
benefits: Crop insurance cover with low premium; compensation on crop loss due to natural calamities
description: An insurance scheme protecting farmers against crop failure due to unforeseen natural events, pests, or diseases.

name: National Skill Development Scholarship
benefits: Free vocational training and certification with placement assistance
description: Provides free industry-relevant skill training to unemployed youth to improve employability across sectors.

name: Ayushman Bharat Health Cover
benefits: Health cover up to ₹5,00,000 per family per year for secondary and tertiary care
description: A flagship health assurance scheme offering free treatment at empanelled hospitals for economically vulnerable families.

name: Stand-Up India Startup Loan
benefits: Bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore for setting up a new enterprise
description: Facilitates bank loans to SC/ST and women entrepreneurs setting up greenfield enterprises in manufacturing, trading or services.

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
benefits: Financial incentives, awareness drives and educational support for the girl child
description: A national campaign aimed at improving the child sex ratio and promoting education for girls.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development

name: PM Awas Yojana - Urban
benefits: Interest subsidy up to ₹2.67 lakh on home loans for affordable housing
description: Aims to provide pucca houses with basic amenities to all eligible urban households by offering credit-linked subsidies.

name: National Old Age Pension Scheme
benefits: Monthly pension of ₹200-500 depending on state contribution
description: Provides monthly financial assistance to senior citizens living below the poverty line.

name: NGO Rural Skill Empowerment Program
benefits: Free tailoring, computer and electrical skill workshops with toolkit on completion
description: Run by a rural development NGO to equip unemployed youth in villages with employable trade skills.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
benefits: High interest savings account for girl child maturing at marriage or higher education
description: A small savings scheme for parents of girl children to build a corpus for future education and marriage expenses.

name: Divyangjan Swavalamban Yojana
benefits: Subsidised loans and assistive devices for persons with disabilities to start self-employment
description: Supports persons with disabilities in gaining financial independence through self-employment and assistive technology.

name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
benefits: Toolkit incentive of ₹15,000 and collateral-free loans up to ₹3 lakh
description: Supports traditional artisans and craftspeople with skill upgradation, tools, and low-interest credit.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises

name: Mission Vatsalya Child Welfare
benefits: Financial and institutional support for orphaned and vulnerable children
description: A child protection scheme ensuring care, protection and rehabilitation for children in difficult circumstances.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development

name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana
benefits: Subsidies on farm equipment, irrigation infrastructure, and organic farming inputs
description: A central scheme allowing states to plan agricultural development based on local needs, with focus on holistic growth.

name: Digital Literacy Mission NGO
benefits: Free digital literacy classes and certification for rural students
description: An NGO-led initiative bridging the digital divide by training students and adults in basic computer skills.

name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship
benefits: ₹12,000 per year scholarship for meritorious students from economically weaker sections
description: Supports talented students from low-income families to continue education at the secondary stage and reduce dropout rates.

name: Mahila Udyam Nidhi Yojana
benefits: Soft loans up to ₹10 lakh for women setting up small-scale enterprises
description: Offers concessional loans to women entrepreneurs for setting up new micro and small businesses.
ministry: Small Industries Development Bank of India

name: Antyodaya Anna Yojana
benefits: Highly subsidised foodgrains of 35kg per month per family
description: Targets the poorest of poor families under the public distribution system, providing food security at nominal cost.
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution

name: Ex-Servicemen Re-employment Scheme
benefits: Priority placement, skill certification and reserved vacancies in government jobs
description: Facilitates smooth transition of ex-servicemen into civilian employment through re-skilling and reserved quotas.

name: Van Dhan Vikas Yojana
benefits: Value-addition training and market linkage for tribal minor forest produce collectors
description: Promotes livelihood generation for tribal communities through value addition of forest produce and cooperative marketing.

name: Widow Pension Support Scheme
benefits: Monthly pension of ₹300-500 and skill training for financial independence
description: Provides financial security and rehabilitation support for widows from economically weaker sections.

name: Minority Girls Scholarship Scheme
benefits: Full tuition fee reimbursement and maintenance allowance for minority girl students
description: Encourages higher education among girls from notified minority communities with financial support and mentorship.

name: Startup India Seed Fund
benefits: Seed funding up to ₹20 lakh for proof of concept and prototype development
description: Provides financial assistance to early-stage startups for product trials, prototype development and market entry.
ministry: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade

name: Free Coaching for SC/ST Students
benefits: Free competitive exam coaching plus monthly stipend of ₹3,000
description: Offers free coaching for civil services and entrance examinations to students from SC/ST communities.

name: Rural Housing NGO Initiative
benefits: Construction support and material subsidy for building a pucca house
description: An NGO partnership programme that helps landless rural families build safe, durable housing.

name: Atal Pension Yojana
benefits: Guaranteed monthly pension of ₹1,000-5,000 after age 60
description: A voluntary pension scheme targeted at workers in the unorganised sector to secure retirement income.
eligibility: Bank or post office account holder

name: PM eVIDYA Digital Education
benefits: Free access to digital content, TV channels and e-learning platforms across grades
description: A unified digital education programme providing multi-mode access to quality learning resources for school students.

name: Employment Generation Programme for Youth
benefits: Margin money subsidy up to 35% for setting up micro enterprises
description: Generates self-employment opportunities for educated unemployed youth by supporting micro-enterprise creation.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises

name: Disability Assistive Devices NGO Support
benefits: Free wheelchairs, hearing aids and mobility devices for persons with disabilities
description: A charitable initiative distributing assistive devices to improve mobility and independence for disabled individuals.

name: One Stop Centre Scheme for Women
benefits: Free legal aid, medical assistance, counselling and temporary shelter for women in distress
description: Integrated support and assistance for women affected by violence, under one roof, including police and legal help.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
